Part.Source:
LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context)
Do 'OpenDocument'
&CellRow = 1 &FirstColumn = 1
Do 'LoadGridState'
Do 'WriteFilters'
Do 'WriteColumnTitles'
Do 'WriteData'
Do 'CloseDocument'
Sub 'OpenDocument'
&Random = Random() * 10000 &Filename = !"ExportwpMonitoraCertificados-" + &Random.ToString().Trim() + !".xlsx" &ExcelDocument.Open(&Filename) Do 'CheckStatus' &ExcelDocument.Clear()
EndSub
Sub 'WriteFilters'
If not (&PesTip.IsEmpty()) &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 0).Italic = True If Not &PesTip.IsEmpty() &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 0).Text = &PesTip.EnumerationDescription() Endif EndIf If not (&FiltroPesRaz.IsEmpty()) &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 0).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 0).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 0).Text = "Razão" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = &FiltroPesRaz EndIf If not (&PesCod.IsEmpty()) &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 0).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 0).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 0).Text = "Código" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Number = &PesCod EndIf If not (&PesDtaVctCer.IsEmpty() AND &PesDtaVctCer_To.IsEmpty() AND &MesPesDtaVctCer.IsEmpty()) &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 0).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 0).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 0).Text = "Vct." &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Date = &PesDtaVctCer &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Text = "à" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 3).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 3).Date = &PesDtaVctCer_To &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 4).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 4).Text = '' do Case Case &MesPesDtaVctCer = 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 4).Text = "Janeiro" Case &MesPesDtaVctCer = 2 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 4).Text = "Feveiro" Case &MesPesDtaVctCer = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 4).Text = "Março" Case &MesPesDtaVctCer = 4 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 4).Text = "Abril" Case &MesPesDtaVctCer = 5 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 4).Text = "Maio" Case &MesPesDtaVctCer = 6 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 4).Text = "Junho" Case &MesPesDtaVctCer = 7 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 4).Text = "Julho" Case &MesPesDtaVctCer = 8 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 4).Text = "Agosto" Case &MesPesDtaVctCer = 9 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 4).Text = "Setembro" Case &MesPesDtaVctCer = 10 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 4).Text = "Outubro" Case &MesPesDtaVctCer = 11 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 4).Text = "Novembro" Case &MesPesDtaVctCer = 12 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 4).Text = "Dezembro" EndCase EndIf If not (&PesSts.IsEmpty()) &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 0).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 0).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 0).Text = "Pessoa Ativo/Inativo" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True If Not &PesSts.IsEmpty() &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = &PesSts.EnumerationDescription() Endif EndIf If not (&PesIsCli.IsEmpty()) &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 0).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 0).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 0).Text = "" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = &PesIsCli.ToString() EndIf If not (&PesEscCtbCod.IsEmpty()) &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 0).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 0).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 0).Text = "Esc." &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Number = &PesEscCtbCod EndIf If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCPF' &PesCpf1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesCpf1.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "CPF/CNPJ" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = &PesCpf1 EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESFAN' &PesFan1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesFan1.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Nome.Fantas." &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = &PesFan1 EndIf EndCase If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(2) &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCPF' &PesCpf2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesCpf2.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "CPF/CNPJ" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = &PesCpf2 EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESFAN' &PesFan2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesFan2.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Nome.Fantas." &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = &PesFan2 EndIf EndCase If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 3 &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(3) &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCPF' &PesCpf3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesCpf3.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "CPF/CNPJ" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = &PesCpf3 EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESFAN' &PesFan3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PesFan3.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Nome.Fantas." &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = &PesFan3 EndIf EndCase EndIf EndIf EndIf &CellRow += 2
EndSub
Sub 'WriteColumnTitles'
&ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 0).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 0).Color = 11 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 0).Text = "Cliente" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Color = 11 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "Vencimento" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Color = 11 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Text = "Cpf/Cnpj" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 3).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 3).Color = 11 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 3).Text = "UF/Cidade" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 4).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 4).Color = 11 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 4).Text = "Fone" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 5).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 5).Color = 11 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 5).Text = "Contato" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 6).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 6).Color = 11 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 6).Text = "Esc.Contábil" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 7).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 7).Color = 11 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 7).Text = "Administrador" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 8).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 8).Color = 11 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 8).Text = "Cliente JASPI ?"
EndSub
Sub 'WriteData'
For each order EmpCod (PesTip) PesDtaVctCer (PesEscCtbCod) PesRaz using DSwpMonitoraCertificados(&PesTip, &PesAviCer, &FiltroPesRaz, &PesCod, &PesDtaVctCer, &PesDtaVctCer_To, &MesPesDtaVctCer , &PesSts, &PesIsCli, &PesEscCtbCod, &DynamicFiltersSelector1, &PesCpf1, &PesFan1 , &DynamicFiltersEnabled2, &DynamicFiltersSelector2, &PesCpf2, &PesFan2, &DynamicFiltersEnabled3, &DynamicFiltersSelector3 , &PesCpf3, &PesFan3) &CellRow += 1 &gridPesRaz = PesCodRaz if PesCodRaz.Length() > 30 &gridPesRaz = substr(PesCodRaz,1,50)+ '...' Endif &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 0).Text = &gridPesRaz &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Date = PesDtaVctCer If PesTip = 'J' //JURIDICA &CpfCnpj = PesCnpj Else &CpfCnpj = PesCpf EndIF &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Text = &CpfCnpj &gridPesCidNom = PesCidUfeCod.Trim() +' / '+ PesCidNom.Trim() &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 3).Text = &gridPesCidNom &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 4).Text = PesPrmFon RetornaPrimeiroContato.Call(EmpCod, PesCod, &PesFonCon) &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 5).Text = &PesFonCon
&PesEscCtbCod = PesEscCtbCod Do 'loadEscContabil' &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 6).Text = Upper(&CrtRaz) &AuxPesCod = PesCod Do 'loadAdm' &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 7).Text = Upper(&VarChar) &Cliente = iif(PesEmpSecCod.IsEmpty() or PesEmpSecCod.IsNull(), 'N','S') &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 8).Text = &Cliente EndFor
EndSub
Sub 'CloseDocument'
&ExcelDocument.Save() Do 'CheckStatus' &ExcelDocument.Close()
EndSub
Sub 'CheckStatus'
If (&ExcelDocument.ErrCode <> 0) &Filename = "" &ErrorMessage = &ExcelDocument.ErrDescription &ExcelDocument.Close() Return EndIf
EndSub
Sub 'LoadGridState'
If &Session.Get(!"wpMonitoraCertificadosGridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(!"wpMonitoraCertificadosGridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(!"wpMonitoraCertificadosGridState")) Endif
For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PESTIP" &PesTip.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FILTROPESRAZ" &FiltroPesRaz.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PESCOD" &PesCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PESDTAVCTCER" &PesDtaVctCer.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) &PesDtaVctCer_To.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.ValueTo) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"MESPESDTAVCTCER" &MesPesDtaVctCer.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PESSTS" &PesSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PESISCLI" &PesIsCli.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PESESCCTBCOD" &PesEscCtbCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor
EndSub
Sub 'loadEscContabil'
&CrtRaz.SetEmpty() For each order CrtCod where CrtCod = &PesEscCtbCod &CrtRaz = CrtRaz exit when none &CrtRaz = '-------' EndFor
EndSub
Sub 'loadAdm'
&VarChar.SetEmpty() RetornaAdministradores.Call(&Context.EmpCod,&AuxPesCod,&VarChar) // For each order EmpCod,PesCod,PesSocCod // where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod // where PesCod = &AuxPesCod // where PesSocAdm = Status_SimNao.Sim // if &VarChar <> '' // &VarChar += ' / ' // EndIf // &VarChar += PesSocNom // exit // when none //se não tiver ADM, pega o 1° socio // For each order EmpCod,PesCod,PesSocCod // where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod // where PesCod = &AuxPesCod // if &VarChar <> '' // &VarChar += ' / ' // EndIf // &VarChar += PesSocNom // EndFor // EndFor
EndSub
